story: After record-setting World Cup, Telemundo acquires U.S. TV rights to Champions League - The New York Times
title: Telemundo Gets Champions League
script: Telemundo acquires Champions League rights. This move matters as it expands their soccer coverage after a record-setting World Cup. They now join the elite broadcasters with major European competitions, further solidifying their position in the US market. The deal is a multiyear agreement, giving them exclusive rights to broadcast top-tier matches. With this acquisition, Telemundo is poised to attract a large following, but will this be enough to dominate the US soccer scene, or is there still more to come?
